goblin.name: Scavver
goblin.flavor: A starving thing that learned to walk upright when the food ran out.

wolf.name: Gaunt Wolf
wolf.flavor: Every rib shows through its hide. It has not eaten, and it has not died.

bandit.name: Cutthroat
bandit.flavor: A farmer once. The Pall left him only his knife and his hunger.

pallid_stag.name: Pallid Stag
pallid_stag.flavor: Once the wood's forester. He wore antlers of dead branch to pass unseen, and wore them far too long.

drowned_thresher.name: Drowned Thresher
drowned_thresher.flavor: A field-hand who kept reaping after the floodwater closed over the rows.

silt_drowner.name: Silt Drowner
silt_drowner.flavor: A child sent running to call the outer holds to supper. The supper was never sent.

bog_lurcher.name: Bog Lurcher
bog_lurcher.flavor: A tax-rider of the capital, still riding its rounds of holds that drowned owing nothing.

last_reaper.name: Last Reaper
last_reaper.flavor: The weir-keeper who sealed the last gate. The Reach gave him the flood he spent a life withholding.

doorshut.name: The Doorshut
doorshut.flavor: She held the lane door against the water until the water came under it. She is still holding the door.

reedwife.name: The Reedwife
reedwife.flavor: She waded out to call her children back. Her children had been called back already, by someone else.

forager_boy.name: The Forager-Boy
forager_boy.flavor: He was sent to look for grain before the gates closed. He has not stopped looking.

bonesong.name: The Bonesong
bonesong.flavor: A hold-singer. The hold's old prayers travelled through the water with him, and he with them.

red_beard.name: Red Beard
red_beard.flavor: The smith of Brackmere. When the gates closed he took his anvil-hammer and started for the capital. The river took him on the way. The Pall left him his hammer, and the water it killed him with.

giant_bat.name: Carrion Bat
giant_bat.flavor: It roosts in the ribcages of the dead and drinks what pools there.

cave_troll.name: Charnel Troll
cave_troll.flavor: It drags the bones of older meals behind it, unwilling to let them go.

dark_slime.name: Creeping Rot
dark_slime.flavor: The Pall itself, given just enough shape to crawl toward the warm.

maw_mother.name: Maw-Mother
maw_mother.flavor: She kept the capital's granary, and counted its stores too few to share. They were not.

pall_magistrate.name: Pall-Sworn Magistrate
pall_magistrate.flavor: A magistrate of Mourncross, still passing sentence in a courtroom with no one left to judge.

hollow_procession.name: Hollow Procession
hollow_procession.flavor: A funeral that set out for the graveyard, never arrived, and never thought to stop.

gutter_wretch.name: Gutter Wretch
gutter_wretch.flavor: It lined its pockets while the holds went hungry. It lines them still, with fistfuls of grey.

hollow_bellward.name: Hollow Bellward
hollow_bellward.flavor: The bellward of Mourncross, who rang the curfew that shut the city's gates. He rings it yet.

censer_shade.name: Censer Shade
censer_shade.flavor: An acolyte who swung the censer through the whole long rite, and could not learn to stop.

reliquary_golem.name: Reliquary Golem
reliquary_golem.flavor: Set to guard the bones of saints. The saints are unremembered now; it guards the empty box.

choirmaster_effigy.name: Choirmaster Effigy
choirmaster_effigy.flavor: Straw and stitched vestments in the choirmaster's shape, holding his note in his absence.

cantor_vael.name: Cantor Vael
cantor_vael.flavor: The cantor who led the rite of unremembering. He carried the realm's one voice, and cannot set it down.

mountain_ogre.name: Ridge Ravager
mountain_ogre.flavor: It was a man the size of a door once. Now it is only the size.

ice_wraith.name: Hollow Wraith
ice_wraith.flavor: It remembers being cold. It remembers nothing else at all.

stone_golem.name: Grave Sentinel
stone_golem.flavor: Set to guard a tomb whose name has long worn away. It still guards.

ashen_penitent.name: Ashen Penitent
ashen_penitent.flavor: The first to climb toward the Pall — and the first to turn back. The Climb does not permit a man to leave it twice.

shadow_warden.name: Shadow Warden
shadow_warden.flavor: The first to climb the Summit. The Pall did not kill it — it kept it.
